name: Kongming

skills.name: Time for Tactics
skills.description: Active skill hits on enemies grant 1 stack. At the max of 5 stacks, he summons prisms to attack nearby enemies.

skills.name: Arcane Assault
skills.description: Fires 3 orbs in a fan-shaped area, dealing damage to enemies hit.

skills.name: Time Shift
skills.description: Shifts in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies near the start and end points.

skills.name: Winning Strategy
skills.description: Channels briefly and unleashes a spirit bomb at the target enemy, dealing lethal damage. lf the bomb defeats an enemy hero, the skill's cooldown is refreshed

tips: Kongming is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 49.2% win rate and 1.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Savant's Wrath → Insatiable Tome → Void Staff → Enigma - Moon Goddess.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Kongming's Mage kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Arcane Assault → Time Shift → Winning Strategy → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Kongming excels into Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Biron, Wuyan without team peel.

Kongming is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.4% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kongming.

faqs.question: Is Kongming good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Kongming is Tier S Mage with 49.2% win rate, 1.4% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Kongming build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff, Enigma - Moon Goddess. Run Nightmare arcana with Smite & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Kongming?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Biron, Wuyan into Kongming. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Kongming completes core items. Kongming struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Kongming counter?
faqs.answer: Kongming is strong into Han Xin, Jing, Ukyo Tachibana according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Kongming when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Kongming good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Kongming is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.4% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kongming.

faqs.question: What lane should Kongming play?
faqs.answer: Kongming is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Kongming?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Kongming or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Kongming vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.8% more often globally. Choose Kongming when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Kongming?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Mage; 1.4% pick rate but only 0.2% ban rate.
